name: Kona Brewing Co. Hawaii Kai
tagline: Hawaii Kai's waterfront brewpub — solid food, great beer, and sunset views over the marina.
mustOrder: Longboard Lager or Big Wave on tap — always better on draft at the source
Kona Brewing pizza — wood-fired, crispy, better than expected
Poke nachos — ahi poke on won ton chips, great pupu
parking: Koko Marina Center parking lot. Plenty of spaces.
talkStory: Yes, Kona Brewing is a big brand now, but the Hawaii Kai brewpub is their original Oahu location and it's actually a great spot. The marina-side patio is perfect for sunset beers after a Hanauma Bay or Hawaii Kai day. Food is solid pub fare — not life-changing but reliably good. The beer is always fresher here than anywhere else. Good family spot too. Skip the indoor seating and grab a patio table.
